Read `AGENTS.md` first.
Read `ai/README.md`.
Use `ai/` as the source of truth.
Read `ai/hooks/`.

Treat hooks as checklist gates.
Do not treat hooks as executable commands.
Apply contract, pre-edit, post-edit, no-backward-compatibility, test, structure, comment, typing, dependency, naming, readme/makefile, claim-evidence, statistics, cleanup, and final-report hooks when relevant.
Block completion when the relevant hook fails.
Do not duplicate full hook content here.
Do not perform release, tag, or versioning work.
Final response must follow `AGENTS.md`.
